title: Original Hopper Recipe
description: The Hopper didn't always require iron!
body:
# Original Hopper Recipe

This is just a simple recipe data pack, nothing special.

**13w01a**; Added hoppers. Hoppers with the damage value of 1, which are obtainable only through world editing, visually point in no direction. They functionally push items upward, however the behavior is inconsistent. There is currently a temporary "work in progress" sprite for hoppers in the inventory. Hoppers can be crafted from a chest and stone blocks with the following recipe. **13w02a**; Hoppers are now crafted using 5 iron ingots rather than 5 stone blocks.

5 Stone and 1 Chest will get you 1 Hopper!

- Stone, Empty, Stone
- Stone, Chest, Stone
- Empty, Stone, Empty

**Side Note**: The game will most likely tell you that the data pack is out of data depending on the version you are choosing to play but it works just fine 1.13-1.20

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59b539eb369881189f2090a75669af867388cfde.png)
